title: More Retail Holdings Services is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)

jsonLd.title: More Retail Holdings Services is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at More Retail Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Kanpur-based team.

About More Retail Holdings Services:
More Retail Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with More Retail Holdings Services!
